title: CASE expressions with constants are not evaluated correctly
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_case (id Int32, name String, value Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_case (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10), (2, 'test2', -5), (3, 'test3', 20);
SELECT IF(value < 0, name, 'valid') AS status FROM test_case;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
key_bug_features: CASE expressions with constants not evaluated correctly
